papers.title: 并行稀疏系统直接求解库SuperLU_MT在状态估计中的应用
papers.titleEn: Application of Parallel Sparse System Direct Solver Library SuperLU_MT in State Estimation
papers.abstract: 针对电力系统状态估计中大规模稀疏线性方程组的求解问题，提出了一种基于并行稀疏系统直接求解库SuperLU_MT的快速求解方法。该方法充分利用了现代多核处理器的并行计算能力，通过任务并行和数据并行相结合的策略，显著提高了大规模电力系统状态估计的计算效率。仿真结果表明，与传统的串行求解方法相比，所提方法在8核处理器上可获得6倍以上的加速比。
papers.abstractEn: A fast solution method based on parallel sparse system direct solver library SuperLU_MT is proposed for solving large-scale sparse linear equations in power system state estimation. The method makes full use of the parallel computing capabilities of modern multi-core processors through a combination of task parallelism and data parallelism, significantly improving the computational efficiency of large-scale power system state estimation. Simulation results show that compared with traditional serial solution methods, the proposed method can achieve more than 6x speedup on 8-core processors.

papers.title: A new substation linear state estimation method
papers.titleEn: A new substation linear state estimation method
papers.conference: 2015 IEEE Power & Energy Society General Meeting
papers.abstract: 提出了一种新的变电站线性状态估计方法，用于快速有效地处理模拟坏数据和拓扑错误。该方法充分利用三相多源量测来建立量测方程和伪量测方程，并在变电站内一起计算。这样，模拟坏数据和拓扑错误可以通过最大标准化残差检验同步识别。由于这是一个线性估计问题，因此它将简单快速，无需迭代。仿真结果表明，即使在同时存在多个模拟坏数据和拓扑错误的情况下，该方法也能简单有效地识别坏数据和拓扑错误。
papers.abstractEn: A new substation linear state estimation method is proposed to deal with analog bad data and topology errors fast and effectively. This method makes full use of three-phase multi-source measurements to establish measurement equations and pseudo measurement equations, and calculate them together in substation. This way, analog bad data and topology errors can be identified synchronously using the largest normalized residual test. As it is a linear estimation problem, it will be simple and fast without iteration. Simulation results show that, this method can easily and effectively identify bad data and topology errors even in case where multiple analog bad data and topology errors exist simultaneously.

papers.title: 基于创新网络图的面向过程的状态估计
papers.titleEn: Process-oriented State Estimation using Innovation Network Graph Based on PMUs
papers.abstract: 提出了一种基于创新网络图的电力系统状态估计新方法。针对传统状态估计方法在处理非线性映射和快速评估方面的不足，通过数据驱动方法将电力系统可靠性分析问题重构为可以直接采用交叉熵重要度采样算法进行处理的分析评估问题。通过系统状态采样、系统最优负荷切除计算以及相关可靠性指标计算，实现了对考虑温控风速概率分布以及邻近风电场空间相关性的估计。该方法在IEEE 5节点和IEEE 30节点系统上进行了仿真验证，结果表明所提方法具有良好的性能。
papers.abstractEn: A new power system state estimation method based on innovation network graph is proposed. To address the shortcomings of traditional state estimation methods in dealing with nonlinear mapping and rapid assessment, the power system reliability analysis problem is reconstructed as an analysis and evaluation problem that can be directly processed using cross-entropy importance sampling algorithm through a data-driven approach. The method achieves estimation considering temperature-controlled wind speed probability distribution and spatial correlation of neighboring wind farms through system state sampling, system optimal load shedding calculation and related reliability index calculation. The method is verified through simulations on IEEE 5-bus and IEEE 30-bus systems, and results show that the proposed method has good performance.

papers.title: 基于创新网络图的电网分支参数估计方法
papers.titleEn: A New Approach to Branch Parameter Estimation of Power Grid Based on Innovation Graph
papers.journal: 电力系统及其自动化学报
papers.journalEn: Journal of Electric Power Systems and Automation
papers.abstract: 提出一种基于创新网络图的电网分支参数估计方法。针对传统参数估计方法在处理大规模电网时的计算复杂度和收敛性问题，引入创新网络图的概念，将电网拓扑结构和参数估计问题统一在一个框架内。通过构建创新网络图，实现了对电网分支参数的快速准确估计。仿真结果表明，该方法具有良好的收敛性和估计精度。
papers.abstractEn: A power grid branch parameter estimation method based on innovation network graph is proposed. To address the computational complexity and convergence issues of traditional parameter estimation methods when dealing with large-scale power grids, the concept of innovation network graph is introduced, unifying the power grid topology structure and parameter estimation problems within one framework. By constructing an innovation network graph, fast and accurate estimation of power grid branch parameters is achieved. Simulation results show that the method has good convergence and estimation accuracy.

papers.title: IMPROVEMENT OF PHASOR ESTIMATION ACCURACY BY PRONY-BASED METHOD
papers.titleEn: IMPROVEMENT OF PHASOR ESTIMATION ACCURACY BY PRONY-BASED METHOD
papers.conference: 2019 IEEE Power & Energy Society General Meeting
papers.abstract: 提出了一种改进基于Prony方法的相量估计精度的新方法。通过分析传统Prony方法在噪声环境下的局限性，提出了一种改进算法，能够更准确地估计电力系统中的动态相量。该方法在多种测试场景下进行了验证，结果表明相比传统方法具有更高的估计精度和更好的抗噪性能。
papers.abstractEn: A new method for improving phasor estimation accuracy based on Prony method is proposed. By analyzing the limitations of traditional Prony method in noisy environments, an improved algorithm is proposed that can more accurately estimate dynamic phasors in power systems. The method is verified under various test scenarios, and results show that it has higher estimation accuracy and better noise immunity compared to traditional methods.

papers.title: 基于广义状态估计的电力系统状态估计方法
papers.titleEn: Power System State Estimation Method Based on Generalized State Estimation
papers.journalEn: Proceedings of the Chinese Society of Electrical Engineering
papers.abstract: 提出了一种基于广义状态估计的电力系统状态估计新方法。针对传统状态估计方法在处理不良数据和拓扑错误时的局限性，引入广义状态估计的概念，通过扩展状态向量和量测向量，提高了状态估计的鲁棒性和准确性。仿真结果表明，所提方法在存在不良数据和拓扑错误的情况下仍能保持良好的估计性能。
papers.abstractEn: A new power system state estimation method based on generalized state estimation is proposed. To address the limitations of traditional state estimation methods when dealing with bad data and topology errors, the concept of generalized state estimation is introduced. By extending the state vector and measurement vector, the robustness and accuracy of state estimation are improved. Simulation results show that the proposed method can maintain good estimation performance even in the presence of bad data and topology errors.

papers.title: 电力系统状态估计中的不良数据检测与辨识
papers.titleEn: Bad Data Detection and Identification in Power System State Estimation
papers.abstract: 研究了电力系统状态估计中的不良数据检测与辨识问题。提出了一种基于残差分析的不良数据检测方法，通过分析量测残差的统计特性，实现了对不良数据的快速检测和准确辨识。该方法能够同时检测多个不良数据，并对其进行分类和定位。仿真结果表明，所提方法具有良好的检测精度和鲁棒性。
papers.abstractEn: The problem of bad data detection and identification in power system state estimation is studied. A bad data detection method based on residual analysis is proposed. By analyzing the statistical characteristics of measurement residuals, rapid detection and accurate identification of bad data are achieved. The method can simultaneously detect multiple bad data and classify and locate them. Simulation results show that the proposed method has good detection accuracy and robustness.

papers.title: 基于PMU的电力系统动态状态估计方法
papers.titleEn: Dynamic State Estimation Method for Power Systems Based on PMUs
papers.conference: 2014 International Conference on Power System Technology
papers.abstract: 提出了一种基于PMU的电力系统动态状态估计方法。针对传统状态估计方法在处理动态系统时的局限性，利用PMU提供的同步相量测量，实现了对电力系统动态状态的实时估计。该方法通过构建动态状态估计模型，提高了状态估计的响应速度和精度。仿真结果表明，所提方法在动态环境下具有良好的性能。
papers.abstractEn: A dynamic state estimation method for power systems based on PMUs is proposed. To address the limitations of traditional state estimation methods when dealing with dynamic systems, synchronized phasor measurements provided by PMUs are utilized to achieve real-time estimation of power system dynamic states. The method improves the response speed and accuracy of state estimation by constructing a dynamic state estimation model. Simulation results show that the proposed method has good performance in dynamic environments.

papers.title: 电力系统状态估计中的量测配置优化
papers.titleEn: Measurement Configuration Optimization in Power System State Estimation
papers.abstract: 研究了电力系统状态估计中的量测配置优化问题。提出了一种基于可观测性分析的量测配置优化方法，通过分析系统的可观测性矩阵，实现了对量测配置的优化设计。该方法能够在保证状态估计精度的前提下，最小化量测配置成本。仿真结果表明，所提方法具有良好的优化效果和经济性。
papers.abstractEn: The measurement configuration optimization problem in power system state estimation is studied. A measurement configuration optimization method based on observability analysis is proposed. By analyzing the observability matrix of the system, optimal design of measurement configuration is achieved. The method can minimize measurement configuration cost while ensuring state estimation accuracy. Simulation results show that the proposed method has good optimization effect and economy.

papers.title: 电力系统状态估计中的并行计算技术
papers.titleEn: Parallel Computing Techniques in Power System State Estimation
papers.conference: 2016 IEEE Power & Energy Society General Meeting
papers.abstract: 综述了电力系统状态估计中的并行计算技术。介绍了各种并行状态估计方法，包括任务并行、数据并行和流水线并行等。分析了不同并行方法的优缺点和适用场景。讨论了并行计算在大规模电力系统状态估计中的应用前景和挑战。为电力系统状态估计的并行化提供了技术参考。
papers.abstractEn: Parallel computing techniques in power system state estimation are reviewed. Various parallel state estimation methods are introduced, including task parallelism, data parallelism, and pipeline parallelism. The advantages, disadvantages, and applicable scenarios of different parallel methods are analyzed. The application prospects and challenges of parallel computing in large-scale power system state estimation are discussed. Technical reference is provided for the parallelization of power system state estimation.

papers.title: 含FACTS元件的电力系统电压稳定评估
papers.titleEn: Voltage Stability Assessment of Power Systems with FACTS Devices
papers.abstract: 研究了含FACTS元件的电力系统电压稳定评估问题。提出了一种考虑FACTS元件动态特性的电压稳定评估方法，通过建立扩展的潮流模型和稳定分析模型，实现了对含FACTS电力系统的电压稳定性准确评估。仿真结果表明，所提方法能够有效评估FACTS元件对电力系统电压稳定性的影响。
papers.abstractEn: The voltage stability assessment problem of power systems with FACTS devices is studied. A voltage stability assessment method considering dynamic characteristics of FACTS devices is proposed. By establishing an extended power flow model and stability analysis model, accurate assessment of voltage stability of power systems with FACTS devices is achieved. Simulation results show that the proposed method can effectively evaluate the impact of FACTS devices on power system voltage stability.

papers.title: 混合量测状态估计相角参考点坏数据问题的处理方法
papers.titleEn: Processing Method for Bad Data Problems in Mixed Measurement State Estimation Phase Angle Reference Points
papers.abstract: 研究了混合量测状态估计中相角参考点坏数据问题的处理方法。提出了一种基于相角参考点一致性检验的坏数据检测方法，通过分析不同参考点之间的相角关系，实现了对相角参考点坏数据的快速检测和识别。仿真结果表明，所提方法具有良好的检测精度和鲁棒性。
papers.abstractEn: The processing method for bad data problems in mixed measurement state estimation phase angle reference points is studied. A bad data detection method based on phase angle reference point consistency check is proposed. By analyzing the phase angle relationship between different reference points, rapid detection and identification of phase angle reference point bad data are achieved. Simulation results show that the proposed method has good detection accuracy and robustness.

papers.title: 旁路代识别算法
papers.titleEn: Algorithm for Series Capacitor Banks Identification
papers.conference: 2013 International Conference on Power System Technology
papers.abstract: 提出了一种旁路电容器组识别算法。针对传统识别方法在处理复杂配电系统时的局限性，通过分析电容器组的投切特性和电流特征，实现了对旁路电容器的准确识别。该方法能够有效区分正常运行和故障状态，提高了配电系统的故障诊断能力。
papers.abstractEn: A series capacitor banks identification algorithm is proposed. To address the limitations of traditional identification methods when dealing with complex distribution systems, accurate identification of series capacitors is achieved by analyzing the switching characteristics and current features of capacitor banks. The method can effectively distinguish between normal operation and fault states, improving the fault diagnosis capability of distribution systems.

papers.title: 基于不确定性推理的变电站拓扑错误辨识
papers.titleEn: Substation Topology Error Identification Based on Uncertainty Reasoning
papers.abstract: 研究了基于不确定性推理的变电站拓扑错误辨识问题。提出了一种结合贝叶斯推理和模糊逻辑的拓扑错误辨识方法，通过分析量测数据的不确定性，实现了对变电站拓扑错误的准确辨识。仿真结果表明，所提方法在存在量测不确定性的情况下仍能保持良好的辨识精度。
papers.abstractEn: The substation topology error identification problem based on uncertainty reasoning is studied. A topology error identification method combining Bayesian reasoning and fuzzy logic is proposed. By analyzing the uncertainty of measurement data, accurate identification of substation topology errors is achieved. Simulation results show that the proposed method can maintain good identification accuracy even in the presence of measurement uncertainty.

papers.title: 基于新息图法的电力系统负荷突变辨识
papers.titleEn: Power System Load Mutation Identification Based on Innovation Graph Method
papers.abstract: 研究了基于新息图法的电力系统负荷突变辨识问题。提出了一种基于新息图法的负荷突变辨识算法，通过分析负荷变化的统计特性，实现了对电力系统负荷突变的快速检测和辨识。仿真结果表明，所提方法具有良好的检测精度和实时性。
papers.abstractEn: The power system load mutation identification problem based on innovation graph method is studied. A load mutation identification algorithm based on innovation graph method is proposed. By analyzing the statistical characteristics of load variations, rapid detection and identification of power system load mutations are achieved. Simulation results show that the proposed method has good detection accuracy and real-time performance.
